videos.headline: Demond Claiborne's 5-yard rushing touchdown gives Wake Forest the lead
videos.description: Demond Claiborne bounces the run to the outside and Wake Forest takes a 10-3 lead over UConn.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Demond Claiborne's 5-yard rushing touchdown gives Wake Forest the lead) 2024/10/19 ESHEET
